Mandatory expansion behavior:
- false (default): All panels can be collapsed
- true: Prevents collapsing the last expanded panel
- 'force': Automatically expands the first non-disabled panel

expansion-panel-root/multiple.description:
Enable multi-expansion mode
- false (default): Single panel expanded at a time (accordion mode)
- true: Multiple panels can be expanded simultaneously
Note: Changes v-model type from T to T[]

radio-group/mandatory.description:
Auto-selects the first non-disabled item on mount.
Radio groups are inherently mandatory (selection can only be changed, not cleared),
so `mandatory="force"` is the only meaningful option.

radio-group/ariaLabelledby.description: ID of element that labels this group

radio-group/ariaDescribedby.description: ID of element that describes this group

radio-group/ariaRequired.description: Whether a selection is required before form submission

radio-group/name.description: Form field name - enables native form submission for all radios in group

radio-group/activation.description:
Activation mode controlling when selection occurs:
- `automatic` (default): Selection follows focus (arrow keys select)
- `manual`: Selection requires explicit Enter/Space key press

Per WAI-ARIA APG, radio groups should have selection follow focus by default.
Use `manual` for toolbar radio groups or when deliberate selection is preferred.

snackbar-root/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

splitter-handle/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

splitter-panel/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

splitter-panel/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

splitter-root/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
splitter-root/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

splitter-root/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

step-item/label.description: Optional display label (passed through to slot, not used in registration)

step-root/namespace.description: Namespace for dependency injection (must match StepItem namespace)

step-root/mandatory.description:
Controls mandatory step behavior:
- false (default): No mandatory step enforcement
- true: Prevents deselecting the last selected item
- `force`: Automatically selects the first non-disabled item on registration

switch-group/namespace.description: Namespace for context provision to children

switch-group/disabled.description: Disables all switches in the group

switch-group/mandatory.description: Require at least one switch to be on. `'force'` prevents deselecting the last item

switch-group/ariaLabelledby.description: ID of element that labels this group

switch-group/ariaDescribedby.description: ID of element that describes this group

switch-group/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
switch-group/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

switch-group/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

switch-hidden-input/namespace.description: Namespace for connecting to parent Switch.Root

switch-hidden-input/value.description: Form field value (overrides Root's value, defaults to 'on')

switch-hidden-input/form.description: Associate with form by ID (overrides Root's form)

switch-root/label.description: Optional display label (passed through to slot)

switch-root/value.description: Value associated with this switch (used in group mode and form submission)

switch-root/name.description: Form field name - triggers auto hidden input when provided

switch-root/namespace.description: Namespace for context provision to children (Track, Thumb, HiddenInput)

switch-root/groupNamespace.description: Namespace for connecting to parent Switch.Group

switch-root/ariaLabelledby.description: ID of element that labels this switch

switch-root/ariaDescribedby.description: ID of element that describes this switch

switch-root/ariaInvalid.description: Whether the switch has an invalid value

switch-root/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
switch-root/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

switch-root/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

switch-select-all/label.description: Accessible label for the select-all toggle

switch-select-all/namespace.description: Namespace for context provision to children (Track, Thumb)

switch-select-all/groupNamespace.description: Namespace for connecting to parent Switch.Group

switch-select-all/ariaLabelledby.description: ID of element that labels this toggle

switch-select-all/ariaDescribedby.description: ID of element that describes this toggle

switch-select-all/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
switch-select-all/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

switch-select-all/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

switch-thumb/namespace.description: Namespace for connecting to parent Switch.Root

switch-thumb/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

switch-thumb/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

switch-track/namespace.description: Namespace for connecting to parent Switch.Root

switch-track/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

switch-track/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

tabs-item/value.description: Value associated with this tab (used to match with TabsPanel)

tabs-item/ariaLabelledby.description: ID of element that labels this tab

tabs-item/ariaDescribedby.description: ID of element that describes this tab

tabs-item/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
tabs-item/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

tabs-item/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

tabs-list/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

tabs-list/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

tabs-panel/value.description: Value to match with corresponding TabsItem

tabs-panel/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | null | undefined
tabs-panel/as.description: The HTML element to render as, or null for renderless mode

tabs-panel/renderless.description: When true, renders slot content directly without a wrapper element

tabs-root/namespace.description: Namespace for dependency injection (must match child namespace)

tabs-root/mandatory.description:
Controls mandatory tab behavior:
- false: No mandatory tab enforcement
- true: Prevents deselecting the last selected item
- `force` (default): Automatically selects the first non-disabled tab

tabs-root/circular.description: Whether arrow key navigation wraps around

tabs-root/activation.description:
Activation mode:
- `automatic`: Tab activates on focus (arrow keys)
- `manual`: Tab activates on Enter/Space only

theme/renderless.description: Skip wrapper element, pass attrs via slot

theme/as.type: string | Component<unknown, any, any, ComputedOptions, MethodOptions, {}, any> | undefined
